## Article Structure

Every article follows the standard format:

1. **Frontmatter** (YAML)
   - Title, slug, meta_description
   - Category, keywords, intent
   - Author, date, branding blocks

2. **Problem Section**
   - Pain points schools face
   - Consequences of poor practices

3. **Why It Matters**
   - Business/operational impact
   - Benefits of good systems

4. **Building Effective Systems** (Step-by-step)
   - Audit current state
   - Define policies
   - Implement digital tracking
   - Staff training
   - Automation & monitoring
   - Transparency & reporting
   - Continuous improvement

5. **Best Practices** (8-10 key points)

6. **How Nexli Manages [Topic]**
   - Features relevant to the topic
   - Automated workflows
   - Dashboards & reporting
   - Compliance/audit features

7. **Branding Block**
   - Founder insight quote
   - Company commitment
   - Problem-solution alignment

8. **Call to Action**
   - Steps to implement
   - Nexli demo invitation

9. **FAQ** (6 Q&A pairs)
   - Common questions
   - Practical answers
   - Nexli-relevant responses

## Compliance & References

### Nexli Features Mentioned
All articles reference only features confirmed in NEXLI_FACTS.md (lines 8-117):
- ✓ Attendance tracking & biometric integration
- ✓ Absence notifications to parents
- ✓ Behavioral tracking & incident reporting
- ✓ Academic performance dashboards
- ✓ Fee management & online payments
- ✓ Payroll calculation & compliance exports
- ✓ Audit trails & compliance calendar
- ✓ DPDP, POCSO, RTE compliance
- ✓ Role-based access control (118+ roles)

### Board Compliance
- CBSE 75% attendance rule references
- GST, TDS, ESI, EPF filing requirements
- DPDP Act 2023 privacy compliance
- RTE Act 2009 quotas
- POCSO Act 2012 safeguarding

### No Over-Claiming
- No articles mention features in "Planned/Coming Soon" section of NEXLI_FACTS.md
- No false claims about unbuilt features
- All Nexli references align with production build state
